name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥 Latest collection inspired tote bag, made of selected two-tone canvas with leather piping details. [Rose] Top handle carry, or use the detachable shoulder strap. 1 exterior magnetic flap pocket; 1 interior zip pocket. Dimensions: 23 x 6 x 26.5cm, 2735
